name: @radzor/function-calling
description: Structured LLM tool use (function calling) for OpenAI and Anthropic. Define typed tools, run agentic loops, and receive validated structured results. Handles multi-turn tool execution automatically.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.description: API key for the selected provider.

inputs.name: maxIterations
inputs.description: Maximum tool call iterations before stopping to prevent infinite loops.

inputs.name: systemPrompt
inputs.description: System prompt prepended to all conversations.

outputs.name: finalResponse
outputs.description: Final text response from the LLM after all tool calls complete.

outputs.name: toolCallLog
outputs.type: Array<{ tool: string; input: unknown; output: unknown; durationMs: number }>
outputs.description: Ordered log of all tool calls made during the conversation.

events.name: onToolCalled
events.description: Fired when the LLM invokes a tool.

events.name: onToolResult
events.description: Fired when a tool call completes and its result is returned to the LLM.

events.name: onComplete
events.description: Fired when the LLM produces a final response with no more tool calls.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired on tool execution error or API failure.

actions.name: define

params.name: tools
params.type: Array<{ name: string; description: string; schema: Record<string, unknown>; handler: (input: unknown) => Promise<unknown> }>
params.description: Tool definitions with JSON Schema input spec and async handler function.

actions.description: Register tools the LLM can call. Must be called before run().

actions.name: run

params.name: prompt
params.description: User message to start the agentic loop.

actions.returns: Promise<{ response: string; toolCallLog: Array<{ tool: string; input: unknown; output: unknown; durationMs: number }> }>
actions.description: Start an agentic tool-use loop. Runs until the LLM produces a final response or maxIterations is reached.

actions.name: runWithHistory
actions.returns: Promise<{ response: string; toolCallLog: Array<{ tool: string; input: unknown; output: unknown; durationMs: number }> }>
actions.description: Continue a multi-turn conversation with tool use.

llm.constraints: Tool handler functions must be synchronous-safe or return Promises. maxIterations prevents infinite agentic loops — set conservatively. Tool schemas must be valid JSON Schema. For Anthropic, uses tool_use blocks; for OpenAI, uses function_calling or tool_choice.
